Variables.Name: bUseMaterialId
Variables.Description: Cached value of bUseMaterialId, should be equal to bUseMaterialId in ALandscape

Variables.Name: LandscapeSectionOffset
Variables.Description: Offset in quads from global components grid origin (in quads)

Variables.Name: MaxLODLevel
Variables.Description: Max LOD level to use when rendering, -1 means the max available

Variables.Name: MaxLODLevel_PC
Variables.Description: Combined material used to render the landscape

Variables.Name: LOD0DistributionSetting
Variables.Description: The distribution setting used to change the LOD 0 generation, 1.75 is the normal distribution, numbers influence directly the LOD0 proportion on screen.

Variables.Name: LODDistributionSetting
Variables.Description: The distribution setting used to change the LOD generation, 2 is the normal distribution, small number mean you want your last LODs to take more screen space and big number mean you want your first LODs to take more screen space.

Variables.Name: ImproveLODValues
Variables.Description: LOD Values

Variables.Name: StaticLightingLOD
Variables.Description: LOD level to use when running lightmass (increase to 1 or 2 for large landscapes to stop lightmass crashing)

Variables.Name: DefaultPhysMaterial
Variables.Description: Default physical material, used when no per-layer values physical materials

Variables.Name: StreamingDistanceMultiplier
Variables.Description:
Allows artists to adjust the distance where textures using UV 0 are streamed inout.
	  1.0 is the default, whereas a higher value increases the streamed-in resolution.
	  Value can be < 0 (from legcay content, or code changes)

Variables.Name: LandscapeMaterial
Variables.Description: Combined material used to render the landscape

Variables.Name: LandscapeHoleMaterial
Variables.Description: Material used to render landscape components with holes. If not set, LandscapeMaterial will be used (blend mode will be overridden to Masked if it is set to Opaque)

Variables.Name: LandscapeHoleMaterial_ForPC
Variables.Description: Material used to render landscape components with holes. If not set, LandscapeMaterial will be used (blend mode will be overridden to Masked if it is set to Opaque)

Variables.Name: OtherMaterials
Variables.Description: Other materials allow LandscapeComponent to change its material in runtime

Variables.Name: NegativeZBoundsExtension
Variables.Description:
Allows overriding the landscape bounds. This is useful if you distort the landscape with world-position-offset, for example
	   Extension value in the negative Z axis, positive value increases bound size
	   Note that this can also be overridden per-component when the component is selected with the component select tool

Variables.Name: MinGrassWeightThreshold
Variables.Description: Minimal weight threshold to generate landscape grass

Variables.Name: PositiveZBoundsExtension
Variables.Description:
Allows overriding the landscape bounds. This is useful if you distort the landscape with world-position-offset, for example
	   Extension value in the positive Z axis, positive value increases bound size
	   Note that this can also be overridden per-component when the component is selected with the component select tool

Variables.Name: GrassColor_WorldMaskNoiseTexture
Variables.Description: Texture used to render grass color

Variables.Name: LandscapeComponents
Variables.Description: The array of LandscapeComponent that are used by the landscape

Variables.Name: CollisionComponents
Variables.Description: Array of LandscapeHeightfieldCollisionComponent

Variables.Name: StaticLightingResolution
Variables.Description:
The resolution to cache lighting at, in texelsquad in one axis
	   Total resolution would be changed by StaticLightingResolutionStaticLightingResolution
	 	Automatically calculate proper value for removing seams

Variables.Name: bCastShadowAsTwoSided
Variables.Description: Whether this primitive should cast dynamic shadows as if it were a two sided material.

Variables.Name: bCastFarShadow
Variables.Description: Whether this primitive should cast shadows in the far shadow cascades.

Variables.Name: LightingChannels
Variables.Description:
Channels that this Landscape should be in.  Lights with matching channels will affect the Landscape.
	 These channels only apply to opaque materials, direct lighting, and dynamic lighting and shadowing.

Variables.Name: bUseMaterialPositionOffsetInStaticLighting
Variables.Description:
Whether to use the landscape material's vertical world position offset when calculating static lighting.
		Does not work correctly with an XY offset map (mesh collision)

Variables.Name: bRenderCustomDepth
Variables.Description: If true, the Landscape will be rendered in the CustomDepth pass (usually used for outlines)

Variables.Name: CustomDepthStencilValue
Variables.Description: Optionally write this 0-255 value to the stencil buffer in CustomDepth pass (Requires project setting or r.CustomDepth == 3)

Variables.Name: LightmassSettings
Variables.Description: The Lightmass settings for this object.

Variables.Name: CollisionThickness
Variables.Description: Thickness of the collision surface, in unreal units

Variables.Name: BodyInstance
Variables.Description: Collision profile settings for this landscape

Variables.Name: bGenerateOverlapEvents
bBakeMaterialPositionOffsetIntoCollision
Variables.Description:
Whether to bake the landscape material's vertical world position offset into the collision heightfield.
		Does not work with an XY offset map (mesh collision)

Variables.Name: bUseHoleConsistent
Variables.Description: Set to true before digging, making the physical data consistent with the rendered data, added by huiwenjiang

Variables.Name: ComponentSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Data set at creation time

Variables.Name: SubsectionSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Data set at creation time

Variables.Name: NumSubsections
Variables.Description: Data set at creation time

Variables.Name: bUsedForNavigation
Variables.Description:
Data set at creation time 
	 Hints navigation system whether this landscape will ever be navigated on. true by default, but make sure to set it to false for faraway, background landscapes

Variables.Name: bUseLandscapeForCullingInvisibleHLODVertices
Variables.Description: Flag whether or not this Landscape's surface can be used for culling hidden triangles

Variables.Name: ExportLOD
Variables.Description: LOD level to use when exporting the landscape to obj or FBX

Variables.Name: TargetDisplayOrderList
Variables.Description: Display Order of the targets

Variables.Name: TargetDisplayOrder
Variables.Description: Display Order mode for the targets

Variables.Name: bUsePCMaterialToGenerateCollision
Variables.Description: Combined material used to render the landscape

Variables.Name: VisibilityLayerNameSet
Variables.Description: All Visibility Layer names

Functions.Name: ChangeLODDistanceFactor
Functions.Description: Change the Level of Detail distance factor

Functions.Name: EditorApplySpline
Functions.Description: Deform landscape using a given spline

Params.Name: StartWidth
Params.Description: - Width of the spline at the start node, in Spline Component local space

Params.Name: EndWidth
Params.Description: - Width of the spline at the end node, in Spline Component local space

Params.Name: StartSideFalloff
Params.Description: - Width of the falloff at either side of the spline at the start node, in Spline Component local space

Params.Name: EndSideFalloff
Params.Description: - Width of the falloff at either side of the spline at the end node, in Spline Component local space

Params.Name: StartRoll
Params.Description: - Roll applied to the spline at the start node, in degrees. 0 is flat

Params.Name: EndRoll
Params.Description: - Roll applied to the spline at the end node, in degrees. 0 is flat

Params.Name: NumSubdivisions
Params.Description: - Number of triangles to place along the spline when applying it to the landscape. Higher numbers give better results, but setting it too high will be slow and may cause artifacts

Params.Name: bRaiseHeights
Params.Description: - Allow the landscape to be raised up to the level of the spline. If both bRaiseHeights and bLowerHeights are false, no height modification of the landscape will be performed

Params.Name: bLowerHeights
Params.Description: - Allow the landscape to be lowered down to the level of the spline. If both bRaiseHeights and bLowerHeights are false, no height modification of the landscape will be performed

Params.Name: PaintLayer
Params.Description: - LayerInfo to paint, or none to skip painting. The landscape must be configured with the same layer info in one of its layers or this will do nothing!
